creator: yds@CoolRat.org
text:
Approved.  Please commit together with PR ports/147988 and PR 
ports/147997.  No PORTREVISION bump necessary for the mail/dovecot-sieve 
port if these PRs are applied together.  However, as Denny Lin 
<dennylin93@hs.ntnu.edu.tw> noted, mail/dovecot-antispam and 
mail/dovecot-managesieve DO need to have their PORTREVISION bumped.

-- 
Yarema
